en: A PSALM OF DAVID.Ascribe to the LORD, O heavenly beings, ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.
zh: 神的眾子啊！要歸給耶和華， 你們要把榮耀和能力歸給耶和華。

en: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due his name; worship the LORD in the splendor of holiness.
zh: 要把耶和華的名的榮耀歸給他， 要以聖潔的裝束敬拜耶和華。

en: The voice of the LORD is over the waters; the God of glory thunders, the LORD, over many waters.
zh: 耶和華的聲音在眾水之上， 榮耀的 神打雷， 耶和華打雷在大水之上。

en: The voice of the LORD is powerful; the voice of the LORD is full of majesty.
zh: 耶和華的聲音大有能力， 耶和華的聲音充滿威嚴。

en: The voice of the LORD breaks the cedars; the LORD breaks the cedars of Lebanon.
zh: 耶和華的聲音震斷了香柏樹， 耶和華震斷了黎巴嫩的香柏樹。

en: He makes Lebanon to skip like a calf, and Sirion like a young wild ox.
zh: 他使黎巴嫩山跳躍像牛犢， 使西連山跳躍像野牛犢。

en: The voice of the LORD flashes forth flames of fire.
zh: 耶和華的聲音帶著火燄劈下。

en: The voice of the LORD shakes the wilderness; the LORD shakes the wilderness of Kadesh.
zh: 耶和華的聲音震撼曠野， 耶和華震撼加低斯的曠野。

en: The voice of the LORD makes the deer give birth and strips the forests bare, and in his temple all cry, "Glory!"
zh: 耶和華的聲音驚動母鹿生產， 使林中的樹木光禿凋零； 凡是在他殿中的都說：“榮耀啊！”

en: The LORD sits enthroned over the flood; the LORD sits enthroned as king forever.
zh: 耶和華坐在洪水之上， 耶和華坐著為王直到永遠。

en: May the LORD give strength to his people! May the LORD bless his people with peace!
zh: 願耶和華賜力量給他的子民， 願耶和華賜平安的福給他的子民。
